name: early fusion
note: Concatenate modality latents then MLP; also the concat baseline in outputs/benchmark_scoreboard.csv.

name: late fusion (weighted)
note: POW-required simplest form; per-modality weighted average of probabilities.

name: attention-based fusion
note: Per-modality attention weights alpha_m exported for explainability.

name: cross-modal transformer
note: Cross-modal attention over present-modality tokens; absent modalities masked via learned absent token.

name: ensemble averaging
note: POW-required baseline: unweighted mean of per-modality probabilities.

name: confidence-weighted aggregation
note: POW-required baseline: per-sample normalized-entropy confidence weighting.

name: quality-gated fusion (abstaining)
note: Extension: availability x quality x freshness x confidence x (1-ood); abstains when all gates collapse.

name: EEG / BCI signals
note: Real LaBraM EEG foundation model + band-power; Mumtaz/EEGMAT/DEAP.

name: EHR embeddings
note: Structured MIMIC-IV events + Bio_ClinicalBERT unstructured notes.
